title: FINAL CLIFFHANGER — camera-ask: what's YOUR favorite memory?
prompt: twinkling fairy lights along the mantel, warm lamp glow. @Mama leans against the partner's shoulder on the couch. @Papa beside her. @Sara on the left, @Eva on the right, both kids between them. All four SMILE happy. Head TURNS toward camera from the left, mouth SMILES wide direct-to-audience. Sara (to camera): "What's YOUR favorite family memory? Tell us in the comments!" Right child waves goodbye to camera, mouth SMILES big.
